title: AURORA, 33932, Palm Pals Kai Praying Mantis 5In, Soft Toy, Green
availability_text: Only 10 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Meet the Palm Pals Kai Praying Mantis Soft Toy, 5in, from Aurora's beloved Palm Pals Collection. This cute green plush mantis is filled with beans and fits perfectly in the palm of your hand. It's perfect for cuddling and makes a great gift for any occasion!

The Kai Praying Mantis is part of the Palm Pals Critters collection. The Palm Pals range includes collections such as Craving, Pets, Craving, Zoo, Aquatic, and many more. These plushies are all super gorgeous and irresistibly cute.

Palm Pals are cute, touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. They are part of our Eco-Friendly initiative, featuring inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic. Our hangtags are recyclable, and our cloth labels are made from recycled materials.

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful plush and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
description: Product Description Let's meet our Palm Pals Kai Praying Mantis Soft Toy, 5in, from Aurora's popular Palm Pals Collection. This cute green plush mantis is filled with beans and fits perfectly in the palm of your hand. It's perfect for cuddling and makes a great gift for any occasion! The Palm Pals Kai Praying Mantis is part of the Palm Pals Critters collection. The Palm Pals range includes collections such as Whimsical, Pets, Craving, Zoo, Aquatic, and many more. These soft toys are all super gorgeous and irresistibly cute. Palm Pals are cute, touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. They are part of our Eco-Friendly initiative, featuring inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic. Our hangtags are recyclable, and our cloth labels are made from recycled materials. Suitable from birth, the Palm Pals Kai Praying Mantis Soft Toy measures 13cm. Kai Praying Mantis is a master of stillness, turning it into the ultimate game of hide and seek! His pals often marvel at how he can remain so motionless, making him nearly undetectable. He embodies the art of stillness, teaching us all a lesson in patience and the power of a calm, collected demeanour. This cute player Kai Praying will surely win everyone's hearts! Safety Warning Suitable from Birth
